spec.name: An Intersection In The Dense Forest
spec.description: You are on a small path leading through the dense forest. The crowns of the old trees leave the forest floor in an unreal twilight illumination. Paths lead north, east and south.

north.description: The small path leads north through the trees.

east.description: The small path leads east through the trees.

south.description: The small path leads south through the trees.

extra_descs.description: The narrow path is probably used by the animals living in the forest.
The trees are mostly old beeches and oaks.
